final:
module ALU_64bit (  
    input [63:0] A,  
    input [63:0] B,  
    input [1:0] control,  
    output reg [63:0] invalid_result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (control)  
            2'b00: invalid_result = A + B;          // Addition  
            2'b01: invalid_result = A - B;          // Subtraction  
            2'b10: invalid_result = A & B;          // Bitwise AND  
            default: invalid_result = 64'b0;         // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
